title: Lynwood Paint PAD Set PA401,Black,200mm (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
description: From the manufacturer Established in 1980, Lynwood are manufacturers of painting and decorating tools and accessories for professional trades, producing the highest quality products with simplicity in mind. Our tools are great for both the professional painter and decorator as well as DIY home improver. High-quality, affordable painting & decorating products Whether you are a professional painter or a DIY enthusiast, Lynwood has everything you need to achieve the perfect finish. Lynwood is a leading manufacturer of painting and decorating tools and accessories, established in 1980. Our company has been dedicated to providing the highest quality products for over 40 years. Our product range of painting and decorating tools and accessories, including paintbrushes, rollers, scrapers are designed and manufactured to the highest standards, ensuring that you get the best possible results every time. Lynwood are specialists in all things painting supplies! Amazing value without the compromise A brilliant selection of brushes, rollers, trays & more Products designed to help you achieve the best possible results
